'''Huba''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Indobok Pirates]].

==Biography==
[[File:Hubba_pie.jpg|thumb|left|Huba drools over [[Nak Pitareeze]]'s [[Stenness pie]].]]

Huba used to work for [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]], a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]]. He was framed by [[Olag Greck]] and hated him ever since Greck told the Hutt that Huba and his crew were the ones who tried to poison his food. Boonda sent Huba and his men to the crystal mines. He and his crew escaped and later ran into [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

While gambling on a race, Huba lost the [[Captain's pendant]] to R2-D2, making the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] their new captain. However, R2-D2 refused to the captaincy as his programming prevented him from stealing or harming anyone. To make up for his decision, he gave the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] his recipe for [[Stenness pie]] as a parting gift.

{{Char-stub}}
